name: GIMS - LinkedIn Lead Scraper (Serper Native Parser)

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, source: 'linkedin', keyword: $('On Webhook Trigger').first().json.body.keyword, city: $('On Webhook Trigger').first().json.body.city, erp_result: $json }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, source: 'linkedin', message: 'No valid leads returned. Try different keyword or city.', keyword: $('On Webhook Trigger').first().json.body.keyword }) }}

meta.notes: Serper.dev provides 2500 free queries/month - much higher limits for free users than Apollo! Built with native JS mapping for maximum reliability.
